info.name: Life Skills App API - Complete Testing Suite v2.0
info.description: Updated comprehensive API testing collection for Life Skills App Backend - Matches actual codebase with all 85+ endpoints, proper authentication flows, and accurate request/response formats.

item.name: 🏥 Health & System Info

request.description: Comprehensive health check including async Firebase connectivity
Root endpoint with API information and available endpoints

item.name: 🔐 Authentication Flow

request.description: Complete user registration after Firebase Auth signup (Parent)
Generate a parent code for child registration (requires parent role)
Complete user registration after Firebase Auth signup (Child with parent code)
Verify Firebase ID token and return user data
Get current user information
Update current user's own profile
Get current authentication status
Sync user data from Firebase Auth (email verification, profile updates, etc.)

item.description: Complete authentication flow using Firebase Auth with comprehensive testing

request.description: Get current user's information for dashboard

Get parent information for the current child user
Get user statistics and progress

Delete parent account (only if no children are linked)

item.description: Complete user profile and management endpoints with role-based access

item.name: 📝 Diary & Mood

request.description: Analyze diary entry with AI and return mood, emoji, and response

body.raw:
{
  "user_id": "{{userId}}",
  "entry": "Today was a wonderful day! I learned about dinosaurs in science class and my teacher said I did a great job on my presentation. I'm feeling really proud and happy.",
  "mood": "happy",
  "emoji": "😊",
  "timestamp": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z"
}

request.description: Save diary entry to database
